# Northgate Services

> Home repairs, remodel touch-ups, and outdoor maintenance in Columbus, Ohio.

## What we do
Northgate Services is a licensed handyman and home-services crew: everyday home repairs, remodel finish work, and outdoor maintenance across the Columbus metro.

## Tagline
Reliable help. Clear communication.

## Location
1840 Northgate Dr
Columbus, OH 43219
United States

Phone: 614-555-0142
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/northgateservices
Website: https://www.northgateservices.example

## Services
1. Home Repairs — doors, drywall, fixtures, hardware, punch-list work
2. Remodel Touch-Ups — trim, paint touch-ups, hardware, finish details
3. Outdoor & Maintenance — fences, gates, exterior hardware, seasonal prep

## How to book
Call or text 614-555-0142, use the contact form at https://www.northgateservices.example/contact, or email hello@northgateservices.example.

## Area served
Columbus metro, OH — including Westerville, Dublin, and Grove City
